args.content: I can't take your part. My share is due today at 19:00 and I'm already finished with it. Please finish yours by tomorrow morning.

action.reasoning: This advances g1 (submitting my share) by clarifying boundaries before working on g2. It addresses the teammate's request directly to prevent scope creep, protecting my deadline despite low energy/stress.
